name: Amplitude, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Founded in 2012, Amplitude is driving the evolution of AI analytics as part of our mission to help companies build better products and digital experiences. We believe we were the first company to recognize that traditional analytics tools were built for websites and marketing campaigns, not for understanding how people engage with digital products.
